checks.name: exact-input-custody
checks.evidence: Tracked ZIP and receipt match their verified v0.49 sizes and SHA-256 identities.

checks.name: safe-extraction-and-manifest
checks.evidence: No-overwrite recipient extraction contains 14 unique safe members; every internal manifest size and SHA-256 passes.

checks.name: recipient-instructions
checks.evidence: SUBMISSION-README.txt requires complete extraction, identifies START-HERE.html, needs no Python, account, credential, or network, and states the use boundary.

checks.name: real-render-and-navigation
checks.evidence: Desktop and 390 by 844 browser checks have no horizontal overflow; both images load; the strongest-result navigation works; all nine file destinations return HTTP 200; the console has zero warnings or errors.

checks.name: claims-rights-privacy
checks.evidence: Official-source precedence, Copernicus attribution, BAER/MTBS/RAVG roles, null analytical stages, prohibited claims, no private path, no email, no secret assignment, and zero start-page external URLs pass.

checks.name: reproducibility
checks.evidence: The verified v0.49 release already repeats the exact ZIP, receipt, 887000-byte wheel, isolated 13-distribution install, 88 commands, and 586-test suite from fresh main.

checks.name: submission-comprehension
checks.evidence: The page leads with the strongest result, retains a failed route, explains source roles and limitations, exposes lineage, and completes the stated two-minute reviewer path.

retained_limitations: One loopback-only favicon request from the linked detail page returned HTTP 404; intended extracted-file use, page content, navigation, and console behavior are unaffected.
The in-app browser did not transfer focus from BODY through its synthetic Tab control; the exact v0.49 Chrome keyboard-order gate remains the controlling passed evidence.
Markdown depth links open as browser text unless the recipient uses a Markdown viewer.
The labels are owner-approved prototype evidence, not independent ground truth.
No accepted dataset, split, baseline, model, accuracy, or inference output exists.
No deployment, GitHub Release, access change, or public-sharing action has occurred.

decision.rationale: Every material recipient, integrity, render, navigation, claims, rights, privacy, and reproducibility gate passes. The retained limitations do not require repackaging the verified bundle.
decision.owner_action: Submit the exact ZIP bytes through the owner's chosen portfolio channel only after independently confirming that channel's access and sharing settings.
